attributes.description: UniFi WAN firewall activity — inbound probes, attack types, source IPs, and active firewall policies
attributes.optionsJSON: {"hidePanelTitles": false, "hidePanelBorders": false, "useMargins": true, "autoApplyFilters": true, "syncColors": false, "syncCursor": true, "syncTooltips": false, "dynamicOptions": {}}

"query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall" | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY port = TO_STRING(`destination.port`) | WHERE port IS NOT NULL AND port != "null" | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 15"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-top-ports", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 20, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "fw-top-ports"}}, {"type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Attack Type Breakdown", "attributes": {"visualizationType": "lnsXY", "title": "Attack Type Breakdown", "references": [], "state": {"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"bh_fw-attack-type": {"index": "fw-events", "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall"
| EVAL attack_type = CASE(
    `network.transport` == "ICMP", "Ping Sweep",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "22",   "SSH Brute Force",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "3389", "RDP Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "23",   "Telnet Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "5900", "VNC Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "443",  "HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "80",   "HTTP Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8443", "Admin HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8080", "HTTP Alt Probe",
    "Other"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attack_type | SORT count DESC"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "bh_x", "fieldName": "attack_type", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Attack Type", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "bh_y", "fieldName": "count", "meta": {"type": "number"}, "label": "Events", "customLabel": true}]}}}}, "internalReferences": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "fw-events", "name": "indexpattern-datasource-layer-bh_fw-attack-type"}], "visualization": {"preferredSeriesType": "bar_horizontal", "legend": {"isVisible": false, "position": "right", "legendSize": "auto"}, "layers": [{"layerId": "bh_fw-attack-type", "accessors": ["bh_y"], "layerType": "data", "seriesType": "bar_horizontal", "xAccessor": "bh_x"}]}, "adHocDataViews": {"fw-events": {"id": "fw-events", "title": "logs-unifi.events-*", "name": "logs-unifi.events-*", "sourceFilters": [], "fieldFormats": {}, "runtimeFieldMap": {}, "fieldAttrs": {}, "allowNoIndex": false, "allowHidden": false, "type": "esql"}}, "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall"
| EVAL attack_type = CASE(
    `network.transport` == "ICMP", "Ping Sweep",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "22",   "SSH Brute Force",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "3389", "RDP Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "23",   "Telnet Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "5900", "VNC Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "443",  "HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "80",   "HTTP Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8443", "Admin HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8080", "HTTP Alt Probe",
    "Other"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attack_type | SORT count DESC"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-attack-type", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 34, "w": 24, "h": 12, "i": "fw-attack-type"}}, {"type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Firewall Policy Rules by Zone", "attributes": {"visualizationType": "lnsXY", "title": "Firewall Policy Rules by Zone", "references": [], "state": {"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"bh_fw-policy-summary": {"index": "fw-policy", "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, zone = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name` | EVAL zone_action = CONCAT(action, ": ", zone) | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "bh_x", "fieldName": "zone_action", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Zone → Action", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "bh_y", "fieldName": "count", "meta": {"type": "number"}, "label": "Rules", "customLabel": true}]}}}}, "internalReferences": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "fw-policy", "name": "indexpattern-datasource-layer-bh_fw-policy-summary"}], "visualization": {"preferredSeriesType": "bar_horizontal", "legend": {"isVisible": false, "position": "right", "legendSize": "auto"}, "layers": [{"layerId": "bh_fw-policy-summary", "accessors": ["bh_y"], "layerType": "data", "seriesType": "bar_horizontal", "xAccessor": "bh_x"}]}, "adHocDataViews": {"fw-policy": {"id": "fw-policy", "title": "logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*", "name": "logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*", "sourceFilters": [], "fieldFormats": {}, "runtimeFieldMap": {}, "fieldAttrs": {}, "allowNoIndex": false, "allowHidden": false, "type": "esql"}}, "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, zone = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name` | EVAL zone_action = CONCAT(action, ": ", zone) | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-policy-summary", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 34, "w": 24, "h": 12, "i": "fw-policy-summary"}}, {"type": "visualization", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 44, "w": 48, "h": 56, "i": "fw-zone-policy"}, "panelIndex": "fw-zone-policy", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Firewall Zone Policy Matrix", "savedVis": {"title": "Firewall Zone Policy Matrix", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{"$schema": "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json", "autosize": "none", "signals": [{"name": "width"}, {"name": "height"}, {"name": "cellW", "value": 44}, {"name": "cellH", "value": 44}, {"name": "lblW", "value": 82}, {"name": "lblH", "value": 44}, {"name": "mxOff", "value": 22}, {"name": "mxX", "update": "floor((width - lblW - 6 * cellW) / 2)"}, {"name": "mxY", "value": 36}, {"name": "rowH", "value": 27}, {"name": "tblTop", "update": "mxY + mxOff + lblH + 6 * cellH + 20"}, {"name": "selectedCell", "value": null, "on": [{"events": {"markname": "cellRect", "type": "click"}, "update": "isValid(selectedCell) && selectedCell.src === datum.src && selectedCell.dst === datum.dst ? null : {src: datum.src, dst: datum.dst}"}, {"events": {"markname": "allBtn", "type": "click"}, "update": "null"}]}], "data": [{"name": "policies", "url": {"%type%": "esql", "query": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES AND `unifi.firewall_policy.enabled` == true | STATS cnt = COUNT(*) BY name = `unifi.firewall_policy.name`, action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, src = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name`, dst = `unifi.firewall_policy.destination.zone_name`, origin = `unifi.firewall_policy.origin` | SORT action ASC, name ASC | LIMIT 300"}, "transform": [{"type": "formula", "as": "nameDisplay", "expr": "datum.name == null || datum.name === '' ? '(unnamed)' : datum.name"}]}, {"name": "zones", "values": [{"zone": "External"}, {"zone": "Internal"}, {"zone": "Gateway"}, {"zone": "Vpn"}, {"zone": "Dmz"}, {"zone": "Hotspot"}]}, {"name": "matrix", "source": "policies", "transform": [{"type": "formula", "as": "ia", "expr": "datum.action === 'ALLOW' ? 1 : 0"}, {"type": "formula", "as": "ib", "expr": "datum.action === 'BLOCK' ? 1 : 0"}, {"type": "aggregate", "groupby": ["src", "dst"], "ops": ["sum", "sum"], "fields": ["ia", "ib"], "as": ["na", "nb"]}, {"type": "formula", "as": "fill", "expr": "datum.na > 0 && datum.nb > 0 ?
